question_text:
412 Fizz Buzz

Fizz Buzz

Given an integer n, return a string array answer (1-indexed) where: - answer[i] == "FizzBuzz" if i is divisible by 3 and 5. - answer[i] == "Fizz" if i is divisible by 3. - answer[i] == "Buzz" if i is divisible by 5. - answer[i] == i (as a string) if none of the above conditions are true.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: Iterate from 1 to n. Use the modulo operator to check divisibility by 3, 5, and both (15). Append the corresponding string to the result list.
